The genus Seaforthia itself is a relatively small group of tropical plants, and Seaforthia alexandriae is one of the few species within it. As part of the Annonaceae family, Seaforthia alexandriae shares characteristics with other plants in the group, such as large leaves and fragrant flowers. The classification of Seaforthia alexandriae reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this family.
